text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa gets injured during training, so I
bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on. You're worrying too much, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Something like this is no big deal!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I just need a little medicine, and I can get right
back to training!
choice_data_list: You know, rest is the strongest medicine.
Let's hurry up and muscle through it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hm... I guess that's true...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But isn't there some kind of training I can do
without affecting my injury?
choice_data_list: You really want to train that bad, huh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Of course! I need training like a fish needs water!
choice_data_list:
But if your injury gets worse, you're going to
need to rest even more.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I definitely don't want that... Ugh...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, I get it. But as soon as I'm better, I'm
jumping back into the ring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a few days of rest, El Condor Pasa is ready
to get back to training.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me! Gutsy moves are my specialty!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urgh! Aguántate, El! You can do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa hypes herself up and tries to
move, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ouch!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Really?! My muscles are failing me now?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I can't do this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like spirit and muscles alone aren't
getting her anywhere. She uses the day for some
much needed rest.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me! Gutsy moves are my specialty!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urgh! Aguántate, El! You can do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa hypes herself up and tries to
move...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh? The pain is gone...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Estupendo! I muscled through it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right, I can finish up training like this no
problem!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa shows incredible resilience and is
ready to get back to training the next day.
